ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(EMX_ID__c)), OR( ISCHANGED(Student__c), ISCHANGED(Programme_Master__c), ISCHANGED(Intake_Master__c), ISCHANGED(PIC__c), ISCHANGED(Application_Type__c), ISCHANGED(Immigration_Pass_Type__c), ISCHANGED(Immigration_Pass_Institution_Name__c), ISCHANGED(Immigration_Pass_Expiry_Date__c), ISCHANGED( OwnerId ), ISCHANGED( RecordTypeId ) ), OR( $Profile.Name = "Admissions Marketing", $Profile.Name = "Admissions and IO" ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot edit the fields once the Programme Application Status changes to 'Pre-enroll'.
